description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tetraweb/php:7.1 Docker image and a mysql:5.6 service, with MYSQL_DATABASE=wordpress_tests and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=mysql variables. Define a global before_script that runs apt-get clean, apt-get -yqq update, installs unzip subversion mysql-client libmysqlclient-dev, enables PHP extensions mbstring mcrypt mysqli pdo_mysql intl gd zip bz2, runs bash bin/install-wp-tests.sh wordpress_tests root mysql mysql latest true, installs PHP_CodeSniffer and WordPress Coding Standards via composer, configures phpcs installed_paths, and requires phpunit version 5.7.9. Add a test job in the test stage that executes vendor/bin/phpunit. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
